miwi        2009-05-10 18:34:58 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/py-mwlib.rl    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  py-mwlib.rl provides a library for writing pdf documents from mediawiki
  articles which were parsed by the mwlib library.
  
  WWW: http://pypi.python.org/pypi/mwlib.rl/
  
  PR:             ports/134262
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3485    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile

  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/py-mwlib.rl/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/devel/py-mwlib.rl/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +273 -0    ports/devel/py-mwlib.rl/pkg-plist (new)
